title: Macaw's - Sajevius
description: A multiple compatibility for Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures/Stairs to Sajevius mods. Currently supports Betterlands and Shroomed.
body:
This mod is a multi-compatibility for Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures/Stairs and the mods created by Sajevius.

The mod will automatically add bridges with materials from other mods.

I had installed Macaw's Bridges - Sajevius, I am afraid that by installing this mod it will delete all my bridges already placed.

Don't worry, this mod converts all the old blocks and items from the old compatibilitie.

This mod is a unoficial addons of macaw's mods, if mod will be crash and bug please report in this issue.

This mod supported :  

- Betterlands
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/QntvByoy/images/563a53de8adb512379d95f20bd378d54b3d3bb5e.png)

- Shroomed
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/QntvByoy/images/d06eb23297ebe7334f9386be291cb6349228e284.png)

_Required Depedency:_

**[AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)**

_Optional Dependency:_

**[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)**

**[Shroomed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shroomed)**

**[Betterlands](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterlands)**
